audit_items.proof_trace: The linear interpolation clamps elapsedTime to [0, auctionDuration] (line 785) and uses validated params where endingPM <= startingPM (enforced by _applyAssetParamsUpdates lines 653-657), producing priceMultiplier ∈ [endingPM, startingPM] with integer rounding only tightening the lower bound. The assetOut exception to validation is safe because performUpkeep (lines 350-356) never starts an auction for s_assetOut — it routes assetOut directly to the receiver — and _setAssetOut deletes stale params on assetOut change.
